intro.title: We wake up what went
intro.paragraph1: Every lead in your database once raised their hand.
intro.paragraph2: We help you reach them again, not with spam, but with timing, context, and respect.
intro.paragraph3: That's when people respond. Not because you pushed, but because they felt understood.

founder.name: Gabriel B. Fronza
founder.title: Founder
founder.quote: "At my parents' clinic, I saw the same pattern again and again: genuine interest, booked consultations then... silence. They were spending thousands filling a bucket that was leaking from the bottom. That's when I learned: you don't need more leads. You need to stop losing the ones you have."
founder.description: I spent 12 years shipping digital art for products that did more than $3.3B in combined revenue: Warner Bros movies, Sega titles, Insurgency: Sandstorm. Then I built a real business with my wife Danique, where every lead mattered because it was our money on the line. Lead Awaker exists because I lived the problem.

credentials.title: It's not a lead problem. It's a leak problem.
credentials.subtitle: From Oscar-winning studios to shipping AAA games. The same discipline, applied to your leads.

items.label: Oscar-winning VFX studio
items.description: Contributed digital art to Tom & Jerry (Warner Bros, 2021). The film did $136M at the global box office. Framestore has won the Academy Award for Best Visual Effects. You don't get assets through their pipeline unless they're ready for theatrical release.

items.label: 3 AAA games in 12 months
items.description: Delivered digital assets for three titles at Creative Assembly, a Sega studio with a $3.1B parent. Three releases in twelve months is the kind of pace that breaks most people. I build systems that scale, not ones that collapse when things get busy.

items.label: Led a team, shipped 2 titles
items.description: Led a team at New World Interactive (now an Embracer Group studio) and shipped two titles, including Insurgency: Sandstorm. The game has done more than $52M in revenue and still has an active player base seven years after launch. Embracer is publicly traded in Stockholm with 100+ studios in its portfolio. Leading a team to ship on time, at standard, with nothing dropped is the same discipline I bring to your outbound.

items.label: Invite-only VR game jam
items.description: Selected for Valve's closed VR game jam in London. Jammed alongside devs who now ship at Valve, Epic, and Ubisoft. When a team trusts you to build something from zero in 48 hours, they're not testing your output, they're testing your judgment under pressure.

items.label: Built a business from zero
items.description: Co-founded an automated trading operation with my wife Danique. 4 years building systems that perform without supervision. Lead Awaker runs on the same principle: if it needs me to hold its hand every day, it isn't worth shipping.

credentials.recognition: Featured artwork on ZBrush Central (Pixologic) and ArtStation. Workshop presenter at Design Week, Federal University of Rio de Janeiro. Published profile in an online design magazine.

cta.title: See it running on your leads
cta.quote: I've shipped under the tightest deadlines in entertainment, then built a business where every lost lead cost me personally. That experience is baked into every campaign we run.

items.a: Re-engagement rates typically land between 5 and 15% in the first 30 days. The exact number depends on how fresh your leads are, how relevant your offer still is, and how well the campaign is dialed in. We don't promise miracles, but we consistently turn silent databases back into conversations.

items.q: How quickly can we get started?
items.a: Most clients are live within a week. We set up your account, configure your messaging tone, import your leads, and run a test batch before scaling. No long onboarding process.

items.q: What if our leads are really old or completely cold?
items.a: Some of our best results come from leads that are 6 months to 2 years old. Age isn't the problem. If the original need still exists and the outreach feels personal instead of generic, people respond. We've seen it over and over.

items.q: Will this work for our industry?
items.a: If you sell a service or product where people express interest and then go quiet, yes. We've adapted Lead Awaker for B2B, clinics, agencies, and service businesses. During setup, we configure everything to match your terminology, your objections, and your sales process.

Our preferred model is performance-based: you pay per booked call, so our incentives are aligned with yours. We also offer fixed-rate plans depending on your volume and setup. We'll walk you through the options on a demo call and give you a clear number. No hidden fees, no long-term lock-in.

items.q: What happens when a lead responds?
items.a: It depends on what you want. The system can book a call straight into your calendar, hand the conversation to your sales team with full context, or keep nurturing until the lead is ready. You decide the handoff rules, and they can change anytime.

items.q: Is this a replacement for our sales team?
items.a: No. Your team closes deals. We handle the part before that: the initial outreach, the follow-ups, the qualification. By the time a lead reaches your team, they're already warm and interested. Your people spend less time chasing and more time closing.

items.q: How do you avoid sounding like spam?
items.a: Every message is based on where that specific lead left off. No bulk templates, no generic "just checking in." The system knows what they were interested in, when they last engaged, and what makes sense to say next. People respond because it feels like a real follow-up, not a mass blast.

items.q: Do we need to provide scripts?
items.a: Optional. If you have conversations that work well, share them and we'll use that as a foundation. If not, we'll craft the messaging based on your offer, your audience, and your tone. Either way, you review everything before it goes live.

items.q: Can we pause or adjust campaigns mid-run?
items.a: Yes. Pause, tweak the messaging, change targeting, update qualification rules. All without losing the context of conversations already in progress.
WhatsApp, SMS, Instagram, or other messaging platforms depending on what makes sense for your audience. We help you pick the right channel during setup and handle the technical side.

items.q: Can we review messages before they go out?
items.a: Absolutely. Before any campaign launches, you see the messaging, the tone, the qualification logic. Nothing goes live without your sign-off.

items.q: How do you handle GDPR and compliance?
items.a: Opt-outs are respected instantly. The system is built with consent-aware logic and respectful pacing. You remain in control of your lead data and the legal basis for contact. We execute campaigns according to your instructions and applicable regulations.
Your data stays on secure, dedicated infrastructure. We don't share it, sell it, or use it to train models. You own your leads, your conversations, and your results.
